title: Daily Sales Summary by Region and Product Category
business_objective: As a sales analyst, I need a daily view of total revenue and order counts broken down by customer region and product category, filtered to the last 12 months, to identify sales trends and regional performance.
grain: Daily, per Region, per Product Category
acceptance_criteria: Row count in gold view must be > 0
No NULL values in Region or Category columns
TotalRevenue must reconcile with SUM(LineTotal) from silver layer
OrderCount must match COUNT(DISTINCT OrderId) from silver layer
